channel.title: DeeperPoint Blog
channel.description: Thin market science, engineering, and the DeeperPoint ecosystem.

item.title: The Market That Keyword Search Can't Fix — Freelance Localization and AI Matching
item.description: Skilled translators in rare language pairs and the clients who need them both exist. The problem is they have no way to find each other — and keyword search makes it worse.

item.title: The Last Timber Framers — Heritage Craft and the Market That's Disappearing With Its Masters
item.description: Master craftspeople in endangered heritage trades cannot find clients; clients cannot find them. The market works by word of mouth — which means it barely works at all.

item.title: "Melancholy Appalachian Twilight" — Why Music Sync Licensing Is a Thin Market Problem
item.description: Music supervisors need tracks they can't describe in words. Independent musicians have those tracks and no one to hear them. This is what a thin market looks like when the commodity is emotion.

item.title: Thin Markets Are Why Canada Can't Diversify Its Trade — And AI Is How We Fix It
item.description: Canada has free trade agreements with most of the world. What it lacks is the market infrastructure to use them. Here's the structural problem — and what AI-driven market engineering changes.

item.title: Why Thin Markets Fail — And What AI Can Do About It
item.description: Most markets work. Some don't. The difference isn't willpower or capital — it's market physics. Here's why that matters, and what we're building to fix it.
